title: Reservation

contactByPhone.title: Contact Us by Phone/Wechat/ Kakao Talk / WhatsApp

orientSpa.name: Sen Spa DaNang
orientSpa.address: 21 Thai Phien Street, Phuoc Ninh Ward, Hai Chau District, Da Nang

welcomeMessage: We are happy to welcome you to Sen Spa DaNang! You can make a reservation at our spa by one of the following ways:

reservationMethods.messaging: Sending us message on Whatsapp, Kakao, Wechat, Zalo
reservationMethods.online: Book online on our website and receive instant confirmation

onlineBooking.title: Online Booking
onlineBooking.description: You can book for a maximum of 10 guests at one time on our online booking platform. Simply choose:

steps.location: Spa location you want to book

onlineBooking.confirmation: Our staff will send you a confirmation email or message as soon as we receive your booking.

reservation.title: About reservation
reservation.content: If you have any pre-existing health conditions such as lower back pain, skin conditions, injuries, pregnancy, etc. please inform us in advance so we can tailor the best service for you.

changes.title: About change / cancellation of reservation
changes.content: Please make changes or cancel at least 24​ hours prior to the appointment.​ This allows us to have enough time to properly receive other guests' booking.

payment.title: About payment
payment.content: Payment can be made in cash or with credit cards. Payment is made after the treatment. Tips are not required but always welcomed.
